variants: Henrietta Xu is a resident of Cloudvale Market who specializes in pathology. Her innovative work has led to the development of the Aethercoil Transfer Circuit, for which she received the prestigious Aegis Lantern Prize. Beyond her professional achievements, she is actively engaged with the Laurelwood Perfume Guild, where she explores her interest in fragrance. Henrietta's unique combination of scientific and artistic pursuits exemplifies her diverse talents.
